heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyFornix studio team has adopted this privacy policy (“Privacy Policy”) to explain how Fornix studio collects, stores, and uses the information collected in connection with Fornix studio’s Services.

decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: BY INSTALLING, USING, REGISTERING TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESSING THE SERVICES, YOU AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY AND GIVE AN EXPLICIT AND INFORMED CONSENT TO THE PROCESSING OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE, REGISTER TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESS THE SERVICES. Fornix studio reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at reasonable times, so please review it frequently. If Fornix studio makes material or significant changes to this Privacy Policy,Fornix studiomay post a notice on Fornix studio’s website along with the updated Privacy Policy. Your continued use of Services will signify your acceptance of the changes to this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: Fornix studiomay disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you orFornix studio to legal liability. Fornix studio may also disclose your personal data to third parties when Fornix studio has a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference with Fornix studio’s rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, or Fornix studio believes that such disclosure is necessary to protect Fornix studio’s rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on peter-dev. To the extent permitted by applicable law, Fornix studio will make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure through Fornix studio’s website or in another reasonable manner.

heading_content_part: If you are under 15 years of age or a minor in your country of residence, please ask your legal guardian’s permission to use or access the Services.  takes children’s privacy seriously, and encourages parents and/or guardians to play an active role in their children's online experience at all times. Fornix studio does not knowingly collect any personal information from children below the aforementioned age and if Fornix studio learns that Fornix studio has inadvertently gathered personal data from children under the aforementioned age, Fornix studio will take reasonable measures to promptly erase such personal data fromFornix studio’s records.
